getAsiImgType() - 类 中的方法com.zwo.ASIROIFormat

getCameraNameList() - 类 中的静态方法com.zwo.ASIUSBManager
You should not call this api below android 21. get connected cameras' name, you should not call it before call ZwoCamera.getNumOfConnectedCameras()

getSupportBins() - 类 中的方法com.zwo.ASICameraProperty
1 means bin1 which is supported by every camera, 2 means bin 2 etc.. 0 is the end of supported binning method

this array will content with the support output format type.
